heading: Leave of absence; aliens
label: 6310 Leave of absence; aliens
text: The head of the agency concerned may grant leave of absence with pay, not in excess of the amount of annual and sick leave allowable to citizen employees under this subchapter, to alien employees who occupy positions outside the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2062(g)(g), .Oct. 30, 1951, ch. 631, § 20365 Stat. 681, . § 402(b), .Sept. 6, 1960Pub. L. 86–70774 Stat. 800The words “head of the agency concerned” are substituted for “head of the department or agency concerned”.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
